hooks.command: [ -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/hot.md" ] && { echo '=== hot.md (repo state cache, read silently, do not announce) ==='; cat "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/hot.md"; } || true
[ -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/hot.md" ] && { echo '=== hot.md (restoring hot cache post-compaction, read silently) ==='; cat "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/hot.md"; } || true

[ -d .git ] && [ -f hot.md ] && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '^(app/|src/|config/|database/|routes/|resources/|tests/|docs/|knowledge/|decisions/|openspec/|CONTEXT\.md|log\.md|lessons\.md)' && echo 'HOT_CACHE_REMINDER: The repo was modified in this session but hot.md may be out of sync. If appropriate, update hot.md (overwrite completely, ~500 words, sections: Last Updated / Build & Quality Status / Active Change & Next Task / Blockers & Decisions Needed / Open Patterns) and append the operation to log.md before ending.' || true
